ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the country belongs to */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the country is located in */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the country */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the country */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "happiness_score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support available in the country */,
  "health" REAL /* Health index of the country */,
  "freedom" REAL /* Freedom index of the country */,
  "generosity" REAL /* Generosity index of the country */,
  "perception_of_corruption" REAL /* Perception of corruption in the country */,
  "data_collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the data */,
  "data_collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "happiness_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each happiness score */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "score" REAL /* Happiness score of the country */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on happiness score */,
  "lower_confidence_interval" REAL /* Lower confidence interval for the happiness score */,
  "upper_confidence_interval" REAL /* Upper confidence interval for the happiness score */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_happiness_scores_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gdp_per_capitas" (
  "gdp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GDP per capita */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gdp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gdp_per_capitas_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "social_supports" (
  "support_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each social support */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "social_support" REAL /* Social support available in the country */,
  "social_support_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on social support */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("support_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_social_supports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "healths" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health index */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "health_index" REAL /* Health index of the country */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy in the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_healths_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "freedoms" (
  "freedom_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each freedom index */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "freedom_index" REAL /* Freedom index of the country */,
  "freedom_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on freedom index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("freedom_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_freedoms_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "generosities" (
  "generosity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each generosity index */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "generosity_index" REAL /* Generosity index of the country */,
  "generosity_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on generosity index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("generosity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_generosities_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "perceptions_of_corruption" (
  "corruption_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each perception of corruption */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country where the data was collected */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "perception_of_corruption" REAL /* Perception of corruption in the country */,
  "corruption_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the country based on perception of corruption */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("corruption_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_perceptions_of_corruption_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login by the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being tracked */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the dataset */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was updated */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_versions_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being categorized */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "category_description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_categories_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being tagged */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_tags_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being commented on */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date the comment was made */,
  "comment_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_comments_comment_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("comment_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being rated */,
  "rating_score" INTEGER /* Score of the rating (1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date the rating was made */,
  "rating_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the rating */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_rating_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("rating_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_ratings_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being downloaded */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was downloaded */,
  "download_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset was downloaded */,
  "download_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_downloads_download_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("download_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_downloads_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_views" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being viewed */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was viewed */,
  "view_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset was viewed */,
  "view_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who viewed the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_views_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_views_view_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("view_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being shared */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was shared */,
  "share_count" INTEGER /* Number of times the dataset was shared */,
  "share_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who shared the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_shares_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_shares_share_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("share_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_favorites" (
  "favorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each favorite */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being favorited */,
  "favorite_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was favorited */,
  "favorite_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who favorited the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("favorite_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_favorites_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_favorites_favorite_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("favorite_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_bookmarks" (
  "bookmark_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bookmark */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being bookmarked */,
  "bookmark_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was bookmarked */,
  "bookmark_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who bookmarked the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bookmark_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_bookmarks_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_bookmarks_bookmark_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("bookmark_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dataset_requests" (
  "request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each request */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being requested */,
  "request_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was requested */,
  "request_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who requested the dataset */,
  "request_status" TEXT /* Status of the request (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_requests_request_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dataset_requests_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
